name: 11ai-web-design
description: Apply the 11ai visual language or a deliberate content-led direction to elegant, accessible web interfaces.

interface.shortDescription: 11ai styling and visual systems for polished interfaces.
interface.longDescription: A visual design toolkit for applying the standard extracted from v0/www or giving an existing interface a deliberate direction using its own content, components, and theme system.
defaultPrompt: Apply the 11ai style to this interface.
Make this dashboard compact and data-rich.
Give this existing UI a deliberate visual direction.
Design accessible shadcn charts for this data.
